gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول أو ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/290)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول أو ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/290)

parts.text: أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( صلوات الله عليه )

text: كُلُّ مُسْكِرٍ حَرَامٌ وَ كُلُّ مُخَمَّرٍ حَرَامٌ وَ الْفُقَّاعُ حَرَامٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Musa, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Washa,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Every intoxicant is Prohibited, and every brewing is Prohibited, and the fermented drinks are Prohibited’.
en.sarwar: 14. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn Musa from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from al-Hassan ibn Ali al-Washsha’ who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘All intoxicating substances are unlawful, everything confusing the power of reason is unlawful and al-Fuqa’ (beer) is unlawful.’”
